title: Collector Vehicle Specification Poster AI
sourceTitle: Collector Vehicle Specification Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 2:3 collector-grade automotive specification poster for electric hypercar concept, preserving the premium magazine drama of the source Lamborghini Revuelto poster language. Subject: electric hypercar concept is the dominant hero vehicle in a three-quarter front view, with powertrain, cockpit, aero, lighting, timeline shown as supporting mechanical sketches, data panels, timeline inserts, cockpit details, and lighting details. Scene: wet night test track surrounds the hero car with cinematic automotive atmosphere, reflective ground language, speed-trace energy, haze or smoke depth, and a premium high-performance presentation context. Composition: Fixed 2:3 poster hierarchy: large hero car centered low or mid-frame, clean title area above, specification panels around the vehicle, engine or powertrain sketch layer, model timeline strip, cockpit close-up, tail-light detail, and magazine-cover balance. Signature Elements: Hero electric hypercar concept, wet night test track, powertrain, cockpit, aero, lighting, timeline, engine structure sketch, parameter information bar, model-history timeline, cockpit close-up, tail-light detail, speed trails, smoke haze, and collector-cover polish. Style: Collector automotive poster with high-end car magazine information design, strong mechanical aesthetics, metallic surface detail, dramatic performance mood, polished editorial data graphics, and 8K premium finish. Color Palette: Deep black track or studio base, sharp highlight reflections, source-inspired Verde Scandal green or supplied vehicle body color, red performance accents, cool metallic greys, and crisp white specification text. Lighting: Cinematic track or studio lighting with wet reflective ground highlights, speed afterglow, smoke atmosphere, strong rim light on bodywork, and legible mechanical detail panels. Camera: Three-quarter front automotive hero view with low premium magazine angle, clear body silhouette, aggressive stance, and enough space for spec information layers. Materials: Glossy painted bodywork, carbon fiber or metal details, glass reflections, wet asphalt or reflective floor, technical line drawings, and crisp UI-like data panel surfaces. Typography: Short readable title and performance subtitle, clean specification labels for powertrain, cockpit, aero, lighting, timeline, small timeline captions, and premium automotive magazine type hierarchy. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

아래 영어 이미지 생성 프롬프트를 사용하세요. 보이는 텍스트, 브랜드명, 변수 값, 매개변수는 영어로 유지하세요.

Theme: Vertical 2:3 collector-grade automotive specification poster for electric hypercar concept, preserving the premium magazine drama of the source Lamborghini Revuelto poster language. Subject: electric hypercar concept is the dominant hero vehicle in a three-quarter front view, with powertrain, cockpit, aero, lighting, timeline shown as supporting mechanical sketches, data panels, timeline inserts, cockpit details, and lighting details. Scene: wet night test track surrounds the hero car with cinematic automotive atmosphere, reflective ground language, speed-trace energy, haze or smoke depth, and a premium high-performance presentation context. Composition: Fixed 2:3 poster hierarchy: large hero car centered low or mid-frame, clean title area above, specification panels around the vehicle, engine or powertrain sketch layer, model timeline strip, cockpit close-up, tail-light detail, and magazine-cover balance. Signature Elements: Hero electric hypercar concept, wet night test track, powertrain, cockpit, aero, lighting, timeline, engine structure sketch, parameter information bar, model-history timeline, cockpit close-up, tail-light detail, speed trails, smoke haze, and collector-cover polish. Style: Collector automotive poster with high-end car magazine information design, strong mechanical aesthetics, metallic surface detail, dramatic performance mood, polished editorial data graphics, and 8K premium finish. Color Palette: Deep black track or studio base, sharp highlight reflections, source-inspired Verde Scandal green or supplied vehicle body color, red performance accents, cool metallic greys, and crisp white specification text. Lighting: Cinematic track or studio lighting with wet reflective ground highlights, speed afterglow, smoke atmosphere, strong rim light on bodywork, and legible mechanical detail panels. Camera: Three-quarter front automotive hero view with low premium magazine angle, clear body silhouette, aggressive stance, and enough space for spec information layers. Materials: Glossy painted bodywork, carbon fiber or metal details, glass reflections, wet asphalt or reflective floor, technical line drawings, and crisp UI-like data panel surfaces. Typography: Short readable title and performance subtitle, clean specification labels for powertrain, cockpit, aero, lighting, timeline, small timeline captions, and premium automotive magazine type hierarchy. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
